title: pittosporum samoense
intro: Pittosporum samoense, also known as Samoan tulip tree or Kowhai, is a tropical tree native to the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Pittosporum samoense include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Pittosporum samoense include tea and tincture, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
